title: Vulnlog Common Definitions
description: Shared types and formats used across the Vulnlog schema

purl.description: Package URL (purl) as defined by the purl specification (https://github.com/package-url/purl-spec)

verdict.description: The human triage decision for a vulnerability. Absence indicates the vulnerability is under investigation

justification.description: OpenVEX justification for why a vulnerability does not affect the project. Required when verdict is 'not_affected'

reporterType.description: The scanner or source type. Determines the suppression file format for reporters with suppression support
